rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a grouped literature list as an example of prior work comparing positive emotions along arousal or relaxation dimensions. In the citing paper, this citation is used to provide broad background for what the field has already done, before positioning the current work as going beyond arousal-based distinctions. The citing paper does not build hypotheses, measures, methods, or interpretation directly on this specific study, and it is not revisited in the empirical sections.
